Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.cache.nonvoted

Interface INonVotedPlayersStorage

All Known Implementing Classes:
BungeeJsonNonVotedPlayersCache, MySQLNonVotedPlayersStorage, VelocityJsonNonVotedPlayersCache
